claim_boundary: The sampled recurrence run preserved typed propagation, observation-only hooks, owner review closure, thin downstream projections, and Agon stop-lines on the inspected artifact families. This does not prove full federation completeness.
limitations: Only public-safe summarized artifacts were inspected.
Missing sibling repos or omitted artifact families would lower the verdict.
This report does not promote any technique, skill, eval, playbook, or Agon surface.

axis_results.evidence_note: Mixed manifest shapes were accepted, adapted, or quarantined without fatal errors.
Graph closure reported ordered batches, depth, lineage, and cycle diagnostics.
Hook run emitted observations and did not write owner canon surfaces.
Beacons stayed in hint/watch/candidate/review_ready posture and did not promote.
Owner decision packets closed review items; SDK hints did not mint owner candidate refs.
Routing/stats/KAG projections stayed advisory or derived and omitted full graph authority.
Agon-shaped forbidden actions were blocked and preserved as diagnostics only.
Report wording stayed bounded and named limitations.

case_notes.note: Example only; not a live workspace result.

anti_overclaim_notes: Do not read this as full recurrence maturity across the federation.
Do not read beacons as owner decisions.
followthrough: Run on real CI artifacts once recurrence emits the full dossier shape.
